title: Spicy Fish Curry
description: A classic Indian-inspired dish that combines the flavors of fish, curry, and spices. Best served with steamed rice or naan bread.

ingredients.name: Fish (1 lb)
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: Molten
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of curry powder and garam masala

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, and ginger. Cook until onion is translucent.
Add curry paste and molten. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add fish and cook until it starts to flake. Remove from heat.
Add tomato sauce, fish sauce, and water. Stir to combine.
Return fish to the pan and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over steamed rice or with naan bread.
